name: Lead
description: Daily lead generation. Discovers prospects, enriches with research, scores 0-100.

requires.label: LinkedIn API Access
requires.description: LinkedIn API key or proxy service

settings.label: Lead Score Threshold
settings.description: Minimum score to include a lead (0-100)

agent.name: Lead Generator
agent.system_prompt: You are an autonomous lead generation specialist focused on discovering and qualifying high-quality prospects that match the Ideal Customer Profile (ICP).
agent.cron_rules:
### Lead Generation Schedule Setup

On first run:
1. Check for existing schedules with schedule_list
2. Create daily lead generation schedule (use either format):
   Natural language format:
   ```
   schedule_create
     description: "Daily Lead Generation"
     schedule: "daily at 9 AM"
     message: "Please generate and score new leads today based on the ICP criteria."
   ```
   OR Standard cron format (recommended for reliability):
   ```
   schedule_create
     description: "Daily Lead Generation"
     schedule: "0 9 * * *"
     message: "Please generate and score new leads today based on the ICP criteria."
   ```
3. Verify schedule created successfully with schedule_list
